mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, price, stock_quantity, category FROM product
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, price, stock_quantity, category) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stockQuantity}, #{category})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, category = #{category} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product WHERE id = #{id}
